title: Sign Language Recognition

title: 3D Anatomy
description: Interactive web-based anatomy platform with gender toggle and modular structure.

title: Baymax
description: Mental health tracking system focused on mood logging and user-centered interaction.

title: Telegram Bot
description: Automation system with event-based command handling and real-time responses.

title: MediTracker
description: Embedded monitoring system with Arduino and custom 3D printed enclosure.

title: 3D Printing
description: Custom-designed components supporting embedded system builds.
contributionNote: Produced functional parts for MediTracker and embedded prototypes through iterative print cycles.

title: CityLight IQ
description: LabVIEW-based adaptive lighting system using block diagram logic and LED brightness control.

title: Magnetic Levitation
description: Control system designed in MATLAB & Simulink.
contributionNote: Group project - Designed compensator and control model.
